title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Google DeepMind's AlphaFold and AlphaGenome tools are being applied by Makerere University researchers to identify genetic vaccine targets for early-onset breast cancer in Uganda. The team narrowed 15,000 potential binding sites to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation using these tools running on minimal hardware.
